item.title: Blazes and Bitcoin
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Blazes and Bitcoin

In California, the fires rage on,
While Trump says the leaders are gone.
Elon Musk’s DOGE plan,
With tech, leads the clan,
In hopes that high costs will be drawn.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Trump Calls Officials Handling Los Angeles Wildfires ‘Incompetent’
  • Inside Elon Musk’s Plan for DOGE to Slash Government Costs
